Diagram showing the X-Fold folding home in its assembled state, flat-packed for transport, and unfolding
Five-panel collage of X-Fold fit-out options: exterior, steel bunk bed, kitchen sink cabinet and bathroom stalls.

Specification table listing four Expandable Home models with dimensions and floor areas from 27.5 to 72 square metres.

Aerial view of a timber-clad Nature Cabin with a glazed gable end and railed deck in a misty forest clearing.
